entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud_FSCM_credit limit_custom app...
entry.content:
Hello @thangarajthomas 

Apologies for the delayed response.

It seems you are currently using Basic Credit Management (BD6), which does not support workflow functionality. However, if you opt for the Advanced Credit Management (1QM) scope item, workflow functionality becomes available. Please note that the 1QM scope item requires an additional license. With some customization, I believe we can meet your requirements

Link : Advanced Credit Management 

Please let me know if I have misunderstood your requirement or if there are any corrections needed

Thank You 

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hello! This is Moustafa from Accenture Frankfurt SAP Practice, Looking forward to interact with everyone 😉

Also, are these plans domain specific and what plan is most effective for an electrical company startup?

entry.title: Re: Order type of the sales order created with solution o...
entry.content:
Hi Soma, 

Please refer to https://me.sap.com/notes/1339209

This tells you how to create a ticket. You can create this under component area SD-SLS-SO 

Once this is created SAP will make the necessary configuration changes. 

Is mise le meas 

Brad

entry.title: Re: FSCM - Credit Limit Requests Approval using Manage Credit Management Rules

entry.title: Re: Review Booklet Designer Add More Analytical Queries
entry.content: Thanks for your question. It has been forwarded to the experts.

entry.title: Re: What is the best ERP for a Startup?
entry.content:
SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP), integrated with either SAP S/4HANA Cloud or SAP Business One, would be an ideal solution for your electrical company startup. This combination offers flexibility, affordability, and the ability to customize according to industry-specific needs, such as project management, material procurement, and energy efficiency.

 

While SAP is not domain-specific by design, its platforms are highly customizable, enabling you to tailor the tools and solutions to fit the unique requirements of your business. With SAP BTP, you can innovate and scale efficiently, leveraging advanced technologies like AI and IoT, giving your startup a competitive edge.

entry.title: Re: Offshore vs. Onshore Instance: China Subsidiary-based Rollout for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Editi
entry.content: Great insights into the pros and cons here. What isn't mentioned is to use an onshore approach but all are hosted in China (central single instance in China onshore, US and Europe offshore). Do you have thoughts on the pros and cons of that approach?

entry.title: Re: AppCreator: Validate business configuration of servic...
entry.content: The error indicates the virtual host name provided as input is invalid. For the SCC X.509: Virtual Host value you should just be specifying the the virtual host name. No http:// prefix or port suffix values. Just the host name. If you correct that it will address the error when running the create program.

entry.title: Re: Looking for a use case using AI/ML offerings powered by BTP.
entry.content:
Hi Nikhil,

You've 2 options, 1 is to look for AI solutions already embedded with SAP (ex. SAP S4/HANA/SFSF will have AI features already with it) or you can build something from scratch using different tools provided by SAP.

Couple of easy ones to try with the AI tools,

1. Build an app from scratch using Joule Generative AI features.

2. Use Document Information Extraction using LLMs, and use the extracted information in an app.

Regards,

Alma

entry.title: Re: New 2H 2024 SAP Successfactors Time (Tracking) Features
entry.content:
Hi @Volker_Ruof ,

Thank you again for a very helpful blog. This blog is always eagerly awaited as essential support document with each new release :).

Best Wishes,

Petra

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud infrastructure is moving to SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content: @aslamlabib94 - I imagine the reason that SAP are doing this is that there is loads of innovation going into SAP HANA Cloud that isn't going into SAP HANA. For example, the Vector Engine, and the Knowledge Graph. By moving SAC to HANA Cloud it will enable the SAC product development team to access these features. Already the updated version of Just Ask, planned for release next quarter is utilising the Vector Engine.

entry.title: How to convert columns into rows in Webi report
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have requirement to change table columns in rows in Webi report as per below. 

Current Table:

Team NameMarket PFYMarket YTDMedical PFYMedical YTD
Team 1152059
Team 2121448

Target Table:

Team NameCategoryPFYYTD
Team 1Market1520
Team 1Medical59
Team 2Market1214
Team 2Medical48

Is there any way to achieve this in Webi report?

Thanks !

entry.title: Re: SAP JOULE
entry.content:
Hello Umesh,

You can start using SAP Joule AI within SAP Build code to build custom scenarios. Blog: How to Build Your First Full-Stack App in SAP Build Code with Joule and Generative AI

Regards,

Alma

entry.title: Re: Follow tutorial to create and run AI Core scenario, but I can't see the result in log
entry.content:
Hello Nanwang,

Is that working for you?

I hope you've chosen standard/extend option while subscribing to SAP AI Core.

Regards,

Alma

entry.title: SAP Teched ---- I was worried this year... On-Premise - Favorite Session
entry.content:
SAP Teched!   It is one of my favorite events.   But lately...  lately - I've been kind of... well not excited.    My company is On-Premise.  I was worried none of it would work with my current job.   Then I gave myself a pep talk.   I remembered that I went to Teched to see all the possibilities.  And decide if there was anything I needed to learn immediately.

Well...  I was excited about all the new things.   I always am.   Then I heard something that really made going to the event worth it for me.   SAP does understand that we have many applications that were custom built.    There was something cool called Tier 3.  I need to read more on it.   I am not the expert by any stretch of the imagination.   Here's what I heard - Our old developments are safe.   We don't have to just drop them all and try to rewrite them quickly in a better way.   The idea is to gradually move to the "new" way of doing things, and phase out our old programs.  We'll actually have the time to move to the "clean core" way of doing things.   The session I was at when I heard that was "Clean Core extensibility SAP S/4 private cloud".   

Big sigh - and happy face from me.  I have developed so much code.   Code is being used now.  It doesn't need to change immediately.  It can be done over time.   Plus as a bonus we get a friend that will help us - like they are sitting right next to you to help you understand how to do something. The AI capability built for all of us - Joule.  Also help you find where that pesky data is hiding.

It was interesting to me that many people were wondering if JAVA and ABAP developers would be obsolete in the future.  My answer to myself was no of course not!  We still have a lot of old code.   Then I look at Joule and think about how many interesting things we can write with the basics taken care of by the AI software.   So maybe in time - the old languages will go away.   If they do, that's OK too.   I new other languages before.   No big change for me.   What has changed is AI.  Joule can spring board us into using all the fun new tools!  My learning time could be significantly reduced.  Then when thought about - I thought of all the repetitive tasks we do.  If they were eliminated, I would have time to work on the "harder" solutions.

Anyway - my short quick recap.   There was a ton to learn.  (as usual)   Another fun fact - on the exercises.  I can do them later on  my own time.  (YES! Github)  That's a big plus.  Honestly, it's going to be a while before I do that.   But once I do - I'll be happy to share my experience.

What did you learn about?

entry.title: How to avoid in a story that tables are refreshed with data
entry.content:
Hello,

In a story I have 2 tables. The first one is a global report and the second one is a detailed FI documents table.

When we click on a cell of the first table, it shows the second table filtered with accounts, cost centers... It works very well as the second table is always filtered.

Unfortunately, in modification mode, the second table is automatically refreshed with all documents lines (Thousands). It leads to a very long time waiting before being able to modify the story.

What would be the best way to avoid that the second table being refreshed in modification mode (avoid that it loads automatically all data) ?

thanks in advance

Mat

Currently, i am facing an issue at the moment to create a BP from ARIBA to ECC. To do it, I've imlemented a BAdI ( if_ex_mdg_bs_supplier_si~map_supplier_data_in ) to assign the external ID supplier to bpartner. The point is the result I am getting is this :  

I have been searching some help about but without success. This issue took me more than 4 days and I would like some tips to solve it. 

I will appreciate any comments about it.

entry.title: Re: Integration of CIM with S/4 Hana Cloud

entry.title: Invoice scanning replaces object's attributes
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I'm currently struggling because I'm trying to upload pdf files to the ByDesign invoice scanner via SAP Integration Suite and, during the scanning phase, ByDesign replaces the object's attributes with empty ones.

So first, I'm sending an Odata query to ScannedInvoiceStagingObjectCollection to create the ScannedInvoiceStagingObject with attributes in the body of my query (Supplier and Company).

Secondly, I'm calling the process function of the same service to start the scanning of the document.

Once the scanning is complete, I realise that during the process, it struggled to read the Supplier name and (rightfuly so) could'nt find the supplier in the master data, but it still replaced the Supplier that was in the Odata POST query with an empty field.

My question is this : Is there away to prevent the scanning process from replacing the ScannedInvoiceStagingObject non nulls attributes in ByDesign ? 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Integration of CIM with S/4 Hana Cloud
entry.content: We are also Facing the same issue able to Integrate the Company Code and GL accounts but Suppliers and Tax data are showing Success but o KB transferred. And Looking Again 4N6_Set-Up_EN_XX Guide but not helping. Any help or guidance is appreciated. Thank You

entry.title: Combine CS15 and CS03
entry.content:
I'm checking which articles contain a particular component, in CS15. I get a lot of results, so it's tedious to check CS03 for every result. Is there a query that show all BOM's for a given component? like a combination of CS15 and CS03? 
Additionally, combining CS15 with MMBe or MB51 would be of interest.

entry.title: Re: How to find out BADIs of Post General Journal Entries...
entry.content:
Hi @Neil_Lee_057 

 

To find what BADI's are available for an APP , i first always look up the app in the Fiori Library like


https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F0718')/S33

 

I click on the App Documentation which takes me to 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/950f8054747b053de10000000a441470.html?locale=en-US&state=PRODUCTION&version=2408.500

 

Here i look on the left hand side for anything to do with extensibility 

I see it has an entry 'App Extensibility: Post General Journal Entries'

Usually on a page like this will it document if a BADI is available for an app.

In this case , custom fields are supported but no mention of a BADI

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: [SAP-MDK] CallFunction action (or rule) sends data as...

entry.title: REA1 updated in Analysis tab but not in under the condition
entry.content:
Hi All,

Please help with below request .

 We have an issue where the 

Condition contract was created on say 11. September 2023 with validy of 01.May.2023 to 30.04.2025 with certain customer and material combination .

But the there was a sales order created before condiction contract creation with same customer & material combination and having the REA1 determined in sales order and Billing Anlysis in condition tab but not in the condition . How come it is possible ?

also the billing document updated in BUSVOL Report , 

Please guide me , though sales order and billing created before condition contract not sure why condition contract showing under analysis tab of condition tab 

Thanks !

entry.title: Re: How to design managed RAP business objects with 3 or more levels of nodes
entry.content:
Hi @Andre_Fischer 

Is it possible to create DemoLevel2 and DemoLevel3 in the same step?

Level 1 Entity is already created.

Best regards,

André

entry.title: Re: Advanced Variant Characteristics_deletion option for...
entry.content:
Hello ,

 

The Status of a Characteristic can be changed to Locked in Manage Characteristic app so it cannot be added to new classes. existing classes won't be affected

The app Remove Characteristic from Class ( CL6K ) is available in class for deleting a characteristic from

class which has objects assigned.

 

For the characteristic is not used ,then it can just be deleted in Manage Characteristic app using the delete button

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I am setting up the EDI output in S4 Hana system. Though I have done the normal Output configurations, I was not able to see the Output in the invoice.  When I try to add the output manually in the invoice I am getting below error message. No outbound service interface for appl. obj. 9000000001, outp. type ZRD0.

entry.title: How to Replace 0 with Blank in SAP Datasphere and SAC
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I’m working in SAP Datasphere and trying to implement a solution where the "Subtotal Amt" field shows a blank instead of 0. However, even after applying a calculated column using the following formula:

CASE WHEN "Subtotal Amt" = 0 THEN NULL ELSE "Subtotal Amt"

The system still shows 0 instead of a blank value in Analytic Model and SAC.

I’m looking for a way to display a true blank (or NULL) for 0 values in SAP Datasphere, so that it also reflects correctly in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) reports.

What I’ve Tried:

  • Creating calculated columns with NULL.
  • Ensuring data model updates and SAC model refreshes.
  • Attempting conditional formatting in SAC, which did not solve the issue either.

Has anyone successfully implemented a solution where numeric 0 values are replaced with blanks? Any help or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: How to group different dimension members in sac report
entry.content:
Hi,

I have requirement to show the report based on different dimension members as a group to show in the SAC report. Is it possible to group different dimensions?

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: DMEE_CTX_Pmtinf.....Cd_CTX not displayed in file
entry.content:
Hi,

I am working on DMEEX- XML file generation CTX format. Under node PmtTpInf> LciInstrm>Cd. Under this Atom CTX is created with Constant value as CTX with status 1 Mandatory. CD is created as Own Mapping (Atom). OBPM4 structure used is FPM_CGI.

CTX is not displayed in the file, when the file is generated  For bank CTX is a mandatory field in the file.  

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: How to group different dimension members in sac report
entry.content: Yes, in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC), you can group different dimension members in reports. You can create calculated dimensions or measures to combine them as needed. Additionally, you can define hierarchies or custom groups in your data model. In stories, use the "Group" feature in tables or charts for flexible visualization. This allows you to effectively present data from multiple dimensions in your reports.

entry.title: Avoidance of goods movements for production yield and scrap confirmations for production orders
entry.content:
Is there a way to prevent goods movements such as goods receipt and goods issue from being transferred to SAP ERP as part of production yield and scrap confirmations for production orders?

Currently, the issue is that the prerequisites for the transfer of goods movements within yield and scrap confirmation are unexpectedly fulfilled (https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/integration-guide/transferring-goods-movement-within-yield-scrap-confirmation?locale=en-US), although it is defined in customising (via the control key) that no automatic goods receipt should be posted.

Many thanks in advance.
BR, Gizem

entry.title: Re: Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Comprehensive Setup Guide
entry.content:
Hi Nagesh,

Great blog that describes Joule capabilities vis-a-vis S/4 HANA Private CE.  I understand it is possible to bring in a Fiori app that is only available in S/4 HANA Public CE into Private CE environment by establishing trust etc.  I believe this kind of solution is possible only when you have hybrid landscape environment i.e. customer is using both Private as well as Public CE.  Is this understanding correct.  For example, I need to be able to use "Funds Overview" app that is available currently only in Public CE.  Is there a way to be able to use it without having hybrid environment i.e. having only Private CE?  Thanks in advance for your attention to this comment/question..

Regards

Rajeev Subhedar

entry.title: Re: How to Replace 0 with Blank in SAP Datasphere and SAC
entry.content:
To display a true blank instead of 0 in SAP Datasphere, use the formula:

/*sql */
CASE WHEN "Subtotal Amt" = 0 THEN CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL) ELSE "Subtotal Amt" END
/* ******/

Ensure you refresh the data model in Datasphere and the corresponding model in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) after making changes.
In SAC, apply conditional formatting to display blank for NULL values.
Validate the implementation with sample data to confirm that 0 values appear as blanks.
This should effectively solve the issue.

entry.title: Re: Error message during the Invoice Output No outbound s...
entry.content:
The error indicates that there is no outbound service interface configured for the application object (invoice) with the specified output type (ZRD0).
Ensure that you have correctly assigned an outbound service interface to the output type in your EDI configuration.
Additionally, check that the application object is correctly defined in the output determination settings for EDI.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Thank you for your email and for the opportunity that SAP is providing to participate in SAP Learning’s Digital Skills Initiative. I am very much interested in this program, as I have been working in the SAP world for a few years now. I am highly enthusiastic in learning and get certified in SAP Finance areas which could be effectively applied in both my support and implementation projects.

I believe I am a great fit for the Digital Skills Initiative due to my hardworking nature and dedication, passion towards SAP S/4 HANA technology. I am committed to learning the SAP skills and thrilled to be in an SAP career.

I honestly believe that I do have the ability to complete the Digital Skills Initiative successfully and earn my SAP Financial Accounting certification. I am a hard worker, great learner and have the initiative to put in the extra effort required to go through this SAP learning journey and the SAP certification after.

I have an SAP Community account (SAP ID: jaisan) and had joined the Beginner Corner. I’ve also read the blog post on "learning SAP" and had begun my SAP Learning Journey studies and started accumulating the required badges. I am mainly focusing on the learning journey for Implementing SAP S/4HANA Financial Accounting, as I believe this certification will greatly help me strengthen my career prospects.

I am extremely confident and thank SAP for the opportunity in taking me as part of this program and look forward to further communications on this. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Regards,
Jaisankar.

Regards,

Sil

entry.title: Strategic maintenance plan
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am a user of SAP PM ECC and have a question about a maintenance strategy plan. I want to include 3 pumps with a frequency of 6 years in one single strategic plan, and maintain only one single pump in each year. For exaple: Maintain pump 1 in 2026, pump 2 in 2027, pump 3 in 2028, pump 1 in 2032, pump 2 in 2033  etc. is this possible?

Or is there another solution to maintain them in one single strategic plan?

Thank you in avances.

Yours sincerely, Mark

entry.title: Re: To set the Ranges for expats as "0" or NA
entry.content:
Hi, 

When ranges are integrated with EC in the Compensation form we can't handle exceptions directly in Compensation. It needs to be done in EC.

You would need to add this field you created as a new attribute for the payRange standard field in the Corporate Datamodel to flag Expats (make sure it is at the bottom, payGrade must always be on top).

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Determinação da contas contábeis débito e crédito no processo de SD
entry.content:
Olá pessoal, tudo bem com vocês? 

Estou precisando de ajuda na determinação de contas contábeis débito e crédito no processo de SD.

Sei que na VKOA faço a primeira determinação da conta contábil conforme o tipo de ordem, porém preciso saber como faço para determinar a segunda conta contábil da partida. 

Exemplo: faço a VA01 e determino um tipo de ordem, nessa ordem faço a atribuição de uma conta contábil na VKOA, depois de gravar essa ordem faço a VF01, porém é gerado um lançamento de débito e crédito, preciso saber onde faço a configuração dessa segunda conta contábil. Podem me ajudar por favor?

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Voice: Interesting Posts, New Areas, More Events!
entry.content:
Hi: Behram here.

I am new member of the community.

entry.title: Re: REA1 updated in Analysis tab but not in under the con...
entry.content:
Hi @Rampe, 

The pricing analysis in a document is determined dynamically, meaning the system reevaluates condition determination when you check the pricing analysis, rather than relying on the condition status at the time of document creation.

Similarly, the BUSVOL report is also dynamic. It shows which documents are relevant at the time of execution, but it doesn’t imply that the documents were created or posted with accruals at that point.

If you need to post an accrual in the billing document (from the SD side) while the contract was created after the sales order, you will need to review the copy control settings (Sales order > Billing document or Delivery document > Billing document) to ensure that the accrual conditions are redetermined during the billing process.
You may also need to adjust the condition class of your accrual condition.

If the billing document has already been posted, it's too late to apply the accrual. In this case, you'll need to either post a delta accrual or reverse the billing document if it must be posted in the original document. 

Regards, 
Gauthier Victor

entry.title: Re: Seamless planning integration between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere - product FAQ
entry.content:
Hi @Max_Gander,

could there be performance benefits whenusing Datasphere as the model is living in the HANA DB of Datasphere and the ressources can be scaled up (whereas in SAC this is not something we as developers can control)? I'm thinking about a very complicated table in SAC with many restricted keyfigures and a big G/L account that users are consuming. These can get slow in certain conditions at the moment. Could this be faster when the model is deployed in Datasphere? Or even slower when not enough ressources are available?

Best

Fabian

entry.title: How to change price determination in material master?
entry.content:
We would like to maintain price determination control as "3". How can we change these materials?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to change price determination in material master?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


In order to change price determination, you can use below application, or, alternatively, schedule a job for that:

Change Price Determination
Schedule Inventory Accounting Jobs


Kindly note that if you want to change a material with price determination 2 to price determination 3, you must first change the price control to S.


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: How to add External SSL Certificate in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
Dear Team,

 

We want to add an external SSL certificate in S/4HANA Public Cloud. Please share steps or documentation.

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: OData v4 ListBinding create(obj).created() doesn't continue on an error
entry.content: Hi @dvvelzen! Did you find a solution? I'm facing the exact same behavior. Nothing works to catch this error

entry.title: Re: How to add External SSL Certificate in S/4HANA Cloud?
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

If you want to use a SSL Client Certificate, you can either use the default certificate of your solution or a client certificate you have defined in the Maintain Client Certificates app. 

With this app you can upload client certificates for your area to enable secure outbound certificate-based authentication. You can maintain one central list of certificates you can use when defining communication systems for outbound communication.

Check SAP Help Portal | Maintain Client Certificate.

 

It is important to say that a list of all root CAs approved by SAP Global Security is available in SAP Note 2801396 - SAP Global Trust List but the specific certificate that you should get must be decided within your company.

 

Kind regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: US Form I-9 Concepts for SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0
entry.content: Hi @ChetanParadkar @VandanaTyagi Once you are done updating the Employee profile with the social security number, go to "manage data" and select "Trigger I-9 flow" in the "create new" section. In the trigger type, select I-9 section 1 so that this will trigger to the employee. The employee will then see a correct i-9 tile on their home page and they will see the SSN value that was entered in the employee profile auto-populated on the form. They will just need to submit the form for follow up steps in section 2. As a long term fix, write a rule (screenshot in this article) to ensure that onboardees enter their SSN, thanks.

entry.title: Re: Finding Attachment Document Locations in Solman ChaRM
entry.content: You can use the transaction CRMD_ORDER to check documents without ChaRM interface

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Benefits: Specific Deduction Start Date for a Benefit Enrollment
entry.content: I am glad it helped you

entry.title: External Learning Request (not SF-182 related)
entry.content:
Our learners often take courses not available through the LMS. I am looking for a way that they can request the training, receive approval, have an Event created in the LMS, and then close the event and add it to their learning history when they complete the training. 

Looking for suggestions/solutions.

entry.title: Re: Cross Domain Proxlet - Timeout Communication Error
entry.content:
@colleenwong, as far as I know, there isn't a course timeout bug happening in Learning. I'd point out three things to be checked, and they're not related to the 1H2024 system version:

  1. Check the "contentStructurePageKeepAliveInterval" setting value and make sure it's "300".
  2. Check the "httpSessionTimeout" setting value and make sure it's "1800".
  3. Check if the Articulate Quizmaker 360 contents aren't sending any "exit" parameter as the users advance on them. This would cause logout/timeout problems in Learning.

Additional details could be found and reviewed in the KBA 2316953.

entry.title: Re: Encargos bancários para Liquidação títulos Santander
entry.content: Sei que faz muito tempo, mas conseguiu uma resposta?

entry.title: Re: Unable to connection BI Platform in Analysis for Office
entry.content: Check out my answer below..

entry.title: Re: Unable to connection BI Platform in Analysis for Office
entry.content:
You mentioned that you can log in to BI Launchpad using SAP Authentication. Could you please confirm whether you have an Enterprise account set up in the Central Management Console (CMC)?

If not, I recommend trying to log into Analysis for Office using SAP Authentication. When using SAP Authentication, ensure you use the correct format for your username.
The format should be: <systemid>~<client>\<USERNAME>. For example: BWP~100\<USERNAME>

entry.title: Re: SAP TechEd 2024 - Summary
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing the summary.

The TechEd 2024 concluded quietly after two incredible days. I was hoping for a closing session that would cover the key highlights of the most important topics.

entry.title: Re: BAPI_PRODORDCONF_CANCEL
entry.content: Hello, any hints here? Having the same issue!!

entry.title: Warning on Tactics page saying account is under configuration
entry.content:
Hi,


When I go to the Tactics page, I'm shown a warning that says "Some Tactics or Variants Unavailable." It then goes on to say that the account is under configuration, and to complete account onboarding. As far as I'm aware, the account onboarding is complete. Is this warning just due to the fact that we haven't activated all channels (e.g. digital ads), or is there something missing from our setup/onboarding?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Warning on Tactics page saying account is under confi...
entry.content: Yes, you are correct. As some channels are not activated/in use, not all the tactics variants can be used. Besides channels, like Web Channel and Digital Ads, features like the Loyalty and Relational Data add-ons are also part of some tactics that won't be available until these features are enabled.

entry.title: Re: SAP IAS User store
entry.content:
It is recommended to always put IAS/CIS in between. Users will not always have to go through the full authentication roundtrip when switching from one cloud solution to another. On top of that, new service like build apps and build work zone require this to integrate build apps into work zone. More and more make it required so it’s definitely recommended to have it.

BUT you still have two options, you can use the user store and enrich the authenticated user of entra id with additional user information from CIS and the user groups. With this you can manage authorisation all in CIS.

The other option allows to use CIS as a proxy only without user store. This will forward all requests and send them back to BAS or SAC.

In both cases, you don’t have to create the user in BTP for bas not in sac. You can use shadow users which create the user automatically during logon.

entry.title: Archive File Storage Error during storage batch job
entry.content:
We are trying to archive change documents for DMS links. We have set up the content repository, logical and physical file/paths, etc. We are running the archive jobs from t-code SARA. We are getting error HTTP error: 413 Request Entity too Large during the store batch job. Our Basis person said that there is plenty of storage available. The WRI, SUB and DEL batch job finished.

Any idea what is causing this error? What are we missing or what setting has to be adjusted?

JobName Spool Job doc Job                          Status                 Duration(sec.                     

ARV_CHANGEDOCU_DEL20240925101531  Finished               42
ARV_CHANGEDOCU_STO20240925101421  Canceled               1           ARV_CHANGEDOCU_STO20240925101531  Finished                0
ARV_CHANGEDOCU_SUB20240925094354  Finished                 0
ARV_CHANGEDOCU_WRI20240925094354  Finished           1,899

entry.title: Re: SAC table add/remove dimension members via Script
entry.content:
Hi Ram,

As I posted I cant use hierarchies because Account D is calculated.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Integration Suite Deploy Undeploy Config tool Part 2
entry.content:
Hi @David_Davis ,

Thanks a lot for the feedback. We will consider all your inputs in next version. We did not try as of now ODATA over HTTP. We also can make it more modular using local integration flows as well optimize from performance standpoint. We also could expand blog with more details. 

We have tested up to 40 iflows/API proxies at once because our current requirement to stop only inbound async/sync flows and other flows are stopped by locking SAP users or deactivating gateway for odata APIs exposed on SAP Gateway. 

We could use timer and externalized payload params but we cannot maintain multiple payloads based on business use case. For instance if we need to group iFlows which are related to one SAP business system and sometimes for all business systems, it would easier to maintain several payloads with postman collection instead of manually changing payloads within iFlow and redeploy each time. We have taken this decision based on operationalization of tool to fulfill grouping of iFlows and API proxies stop, start, config processes.

entry.title: I need list of report in the BO System with the useage list.
entry.content:
Hello I need a report to figure out our current BO system stats.

The report i am looking for this below format

 

Report Type, Folder Name, Report Name, Universe Name, Number of Times Refreshed, Number of Times Scheduled, Total Usage (Number of Times Refreshed + Number of Times Scheduled)


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Calculation View Currency conversion with decimal shi...
entry.content: Hi, the original from which this is referenced, does not have the decimal shift yet (it's seperated in the join). I did try it without and it made no difference. I tried it with also decimal shift back and it didn't work.

entry.title: Re: I need list of report in the BO System with the useag...
entry.content: Webi reports not displaying any data is due to a connection issue between the report and its data source or because the universe is missing from the repository. The error "FWB 00025: Not a valid query" is caused by incorrect parameters.

entry.title: Re: What is SAP Build Apps and how to develop a full-stack application on it?
entry.content: Nice Blog Sudhir! Thank you

entry.title: Migration Cockpit Error
entry.content:
Hello all, we are trying to upload a template but in the migration cockpit, in the preparation step for Accounts receivable template but we are getting the following error:

Amount not allowed. No local curr. type configured for company code

We check the local currency type but it seems everything ok, but maybe we are missing something.

Regards!!

entry.title: Good Afternoon all,
entry.content:
I am new to this forum, but looking for some assistance!

I am developing the 856 Doc DESADV output but having trouble with all the necessary date flowing through to my output document, I am missing all the customer uom, part number, qty ordered, etc.

This information is setup in our system but I do not know how to get it on the delivery. 

Pretty sure there is some copy controls needed but no clue where to start. 

Any help would be greatly appreciated!


Thank you,

Tamra.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition | 2023 FPS02 Release – Part 1
entry.content:
Great news!

when should i start looking for the template on CAL?

2022 edition was there in July 2023.

thx,

gm

entry.title: Re: Restoring Sap Hana cloud instance using a database ba...
entry.content:
The equivalent SAP HANA Cloud documentation is here: https://help.sap.com/docs/hana-cloud-database/sap-hana-cloud-sap-hana-database-deployment-infrastructure-hdi-reference/import-sap-hdi-container-for-copy-purposes

That should provide you with the necessary information to import the HDI container that you had previously exported. 

 

Note that exporting an HDI container can be used as a method to backup an individual HDI container, but that is quite different from creating a full database backup. The good news is that SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database supports importing HDI containers.

entry.title: Difference in Configuration between SAP ALE and SAP EDI
entry.content: What is the difference between Configuration of ALE and EDI in SAP?

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report Viewer Chart Font Issue
entry.content:
R&D had another look at the chart and here's how to fix it:

Hi Don,

The difference of the rendering caused by GDI+ could be quite hard to fix…

However after I investigated more on this report, I found the issue could be workaround…just open report in CRDesigner, right click the chart and select “Chart Expert…”, then switch to the Text tab:

Select the Group title, then click Font button on leftside, you could see the Bold was selected as Font style, just change it to Regular then click OK.

Also change the Data title as well, click OK button on Chart Expert dialog to save the change. Save the report and view it in Winform Viewer:

It looks same as in CRDesigner now😊

entry.title: Re: failed to connect to SAP B1 HANA server.
entry.content:
Hi @Andre_S,

I had the same error with the installer and I found out that on other Windows accounts I didn't had the same problem, so I deleted the Windows account and it's files from C:\Users and recreated it, or just use other account.

entry.title: Re: Unable to access SAP Build Code Trial Account
entry.content:
Hi @Satinder1 

I experienced this issue and fixed it by assigning the role collections Build Code Developer and Build Code Administrator to my custom IAS user (not default identity provider).

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion content - Moving from test to production
entry.content:
Hi Marie,

There could be a number of issues:

1. The SAP Companion configuration is not correct or complete in Production
2. If you are trying to access the content using and Enable Now Learner account, the content must be published in the Production WA
3. The Workarea Permissions may not have been setup to allow users to access content from the Production WA

My initial guess is it's the first item that is the problem but it's impossible to say without more information.  You can either post a screenshot of your SAP Companion configuration here so I can check or raise a support ticket using the Component ID KM-SEN-CMP and get someone to take a closer look.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Why Failure-Mode Focus Matters in Intelligent Asset Management
entry.content:
Very interesting post, Elmar!
I would like to hear your thoughts on the use of Classes in an E2E maintenance scenario: APM functionality kind of assumes that Classes are defined and used, a.o. through the "Manage Strategy Assessments for Classes" app, where it is indicated (but not implemented?) that the same principles will apply for a.o. FMEA. But there is nothing really forcing anyone to use Classes, is there? Object types will often seem to serve the same purpose, but ... will it really? 

Also, as reliability engineering will often have either a function-oriented point of view or at least a system-oriented point of view, could you say something about your thinking along the lines of system objects - in APM and S/4 both? Clearly, assessments are often made on the basis that you want to assure and assess issues for a certain system or functional performance, meaning that you need to look at a somewhat bigger picture and not "just" a technical object. 

Much appreciate your thoughts on this!

entry.title: Re: Upgrade SAP enabale Now 2406 start ManagerSEN failled
entry.content:
Hi,

Unfortunately, it's difficult to say why you have an issue so you will need to raise an SAP support ticket using the Component ID KM-SEN-MGR and get someone to have a look. 

Regards
Shane

The requested structure for the bank:

I need to brake each invoice detail for one tag <Strd>     </Strd>

 

Could you help me please with some idea?

 

Tks in advance

 

Elver

entry.title: Show more than one currency in the same planning view
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I want to display more than one currency in the same planning view

For example, I want to see the price of a product in Dollar and Euro, both of them at the same time in the same planning view. How can I do that?

Thanks a lot for your help,

Alicia
